description: Bring out the gypsy in  you with these funky slippers from catwalk. The beaded strings around the ankle and the thong straps on the forefoot make this pair a perfect beach and party wear. Pair it with shorts and vests when chilling out at the sea, or with a short skirt and a ruffled top when heading to a party.UpperTextile thong straps with beadsZipper on the heel cup for a great FitFour layered beaded string around the ankle for styleMidsoleSoft textured footbed for comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with wooden textureimage of a lady embossed on the forefoot area for great styleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush, using cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
